div.p:
The four Foreign Ministers held a brief meeting at which they noted that the remaining unresolved points in the Protocol on the Termination of the Occupation Regime in the Federal Republic of
Germany and its five attached schedules had been resolved by a Working Group made up of members of each of the four participating countries’ delegations. For the text of the Protocol, see page 1435. A three-page verbatim record of this meeting is in the Conference files, lot 60 D 627, CF 378; no telegraphic summary was found in Department of State files.
